title: 4th's Momento Mori
description: A Dark mod about the undead and experiments
body:
# Memento Mori
![The official logo for 4th's Momento Mori](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b27a59cab7f7049d4ed2832c09877c08abf58361.png)
Step into a dark and eerie world where the undead reign supreme. 

4th's Memento Mori introduces a haunting new dimension filled with shrouded Islands, cursed relics, and restless spirits. Explore the Graveyard Dimension, a realm covered in mystery and danger, where a powerful boss and mystical items await those brave enough to enter.

## Key Features:

**Graveyard Dimension**: A new realm filled with crypts and ancient ruins. Discover hidden ruins and eerie landscapes as you uncover the secrets of the undead.

**New Mobs**: Face off against formidable foes like the Ironblade Automaton, a gear-driven sword-wielding machine, or the Cursed Skeleton, a half-torn, relentless undead warrior.

**Unique Artifacts**: Wield the power of the Ironblade's Lute, a mystical item that grants you the ability return to the surface and use its magical tunes to damage enemys.

**Challenging Bosses**: Test your skills against a powerful boss hidden deep within the dimension, guarding valuable loot and rare treasures.

**Interesting Clerics**: The clerics have learned new techniques to make a special potion that is the key to the dimension, but only the true master clerics can trade it with you.

**This mod requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**

**This mod runs on both Client Side and Server Side**
